rdf:Description.dcterms:bibliographicCitation: Catalogue of the Rare and Valuable Collection Formed by the Widely Known and Eminent Expert and Connoisseur Chev. Raoul Tolentino: Removed from His Galleries at No. 57, Via Sistina, Rome, catalogo della vendita all'asta Clarke (New York, 42 and 44 East 58th Street, 18-25 novembre 1922), a cura di Freund, K., Clarke, A. W., New York, 1922.

Raoul Tolentino: Removed from His Galleries at No. 57, Via Sistina, Rome, catalogo della vendita all'asta Clarke (New York, 42 and 44 East 58th Street, 18-25 novembre 1922), a cura di Freund, K., Clarke, A.
